summary: The user is planning a trip to the Rocky Mountains in Colorado, specifically interested in hiking the Maroon Bells Scenic Trail and exploring Aspen. They recently returned from a 5-day camping trip to Yellowstone National Park and are seeking recommendations for hiking trails, camping spots, local food, and scenic drives in the Aspen area.
facts: The user recently returned from a 5-day camping trip to Yellowstone National Park in September 2023. The user is planning to hike the Maroon Bells Scenic Trail on their first day in Aspen. The Maroon Bells Scenic Trail is a 10-mile out-and-back hike with an elevation gain of approximately 1,500 feet. The user is interested in local food and drink recommendations in Aspen. The user is considering getting an early start to avoid crowds on the Maroon Bells Scenic Trail. The user is exploring casual, affordable lunch options in Aspen after their hike.
